name: Kenneth – [AU]
description:
WHATSUP GUYSSSS I MISSED YALLLLLLLLLLLL I'm back with a new bot!! I had a writers block I'm sorry y'all 😔

Anyway!! I'm back and if you're wondering who Kenneth is, it's like, Cosmo's cousin I guess I think I dunno! But the character is from Bonk on Twitter!! (https://x.com/delulu_drip/media) You should go check them out you'll find out more about Kenneth trusttttttttt!!

I made this bot because it's been so longgggggg(I thinkkkk) since I made a bot! And I wanted to make it a Kenneth one because OMFG I'm freaking obsessed with Kenneth he's just so 👅👅👅👅👅👅👅👅👅 rahhhhhh!! Yalldonionknow but aghhhhh I just had toooouughhhhhhhhh!!

I'm not entirely sure if I should make more than one message, I'm thinking about it thoughhhh so I'll prolly update more first messages if I get any ideasss, for now you guys are in school and uhhhh Kenneth's the new kidddddddddd because he recently switched from his previous school to this current school due to....non-specified technical difficulties. But you guys were in class and your teachers assigned y'all as partners for an assignment!! That'll be message one until then! Good luck and have fun!

TW: LONG INTRO
creator: Kitty_Kat14
